title: To Be the Best Utility: Reflections from former AVEC president and CEO, Meera Kohler
summary: I came to Alaska in early 1976. I grew up in India – I’m half-Indian, half-German – and when I was in graduate school in India, I fell in love with a Peace Corps volunteer who happened to come from Alaska.
